entry.title: Itty-Bitty Jay-Jay
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,479Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 109

Summary: For some reason, Jason has turned seven inches tall. He looks like a doll. Dick wants to place him in his palm and roll him around. He looks perfectly manipulable, a great size to fit inside a palm, to squeeze, and to have his pussy rubbed until he comes. “It’s unimportant,” tiny Jason squeaks. “Don’t you want to have sex with me while I’m like th—hey!” Dick picks Jason off the table and starts pulling off his clothes.

entry.title: Implanted Pussy Vibrator
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,248Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 106

Summary: Jason, unconscious, head bandaged and bleeding from a recent head wound, lies on a makeshift stainless steel table that Dick cleaned and sterilized. He is completely naked, sprawling. Dick had stripped him down to nothing, not even shoes. Between his splayed, shapely thighs, the slit of his pussy can be seen spreading, giving a glimpse of the rosiness underneath. “I’ve lost sleep over this,” Dick says to no one in particular, looking almost penitent in his uniform and mask, holding what looks like a chain of silicone beads. “But… I’ll have to go through with it. I think it’s for the best.”

entry.title: i need a human's touch (but you don't need me)
entry.summary:
Author: Caoxytocin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,427Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 32

Summary: "Cya, stranger!" Robin calls before flipping off with a twist of yellow. The strange boy flies to the next building, and Jason watches him leave with pursed lips. Then he closes the window, pulling the curtains shut.There were a lot of shouldn'ts Jason had done in his life, most of which he wasn't sure whether he regretted it or not. Like how he shouldn't have opened that window, and met boy wonder.

entry.title: The Reckoning
entry.summary:
Author: TrivialCrow

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,361Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 96

Summary: Jason Todd is a submissive owned by the Wayne Family. He is a pawn, a tool in the ever-expanding ambition of the powerful and terrifying Wayne patriarch. He is also both an obsession and a possession to Wayne’s equally dangerous heir, Dick Grayson. When Bruce realizes that Dick’s feelings for Jason extend beyond mere amusement, he bargains Jason away to secure an alliance and rid himself of a threat. But Dick refuses to surrender Jason without a fight, even if that fight is against the man who raised him.

entry.title: Baby Bun-Bun
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,233Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 80

Summary: Jason had to grow up fast as a street bunny and was further thrust into serious “adult” life when he became Robin. Dick used to whine about how he’d missed out on the best years of raising his bunny brother. Now that Dick’s dream is finally coming true, he insists on bottle-feeding Jason. It makes Dick feel better, Jason thinks, about having missed out on Jason’s life before Jason died. “Just because you’re grown now doesn’t mean I can’t pamper you,” Dick used to say to him, scritching behind Jason’s ear. Jason would clatter his teeth in a baby bunny purr, and Dick would show his appreciation with a head scritch and a forehead stroke.

entry.summary:
Author: soldierbound

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,900Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 54

Summary: Having to face Dick every single day wasn't that all bad. Sure, he's stupidly horny all the time, but Jason's not a wild beast. He loves his mother, and his assets: he has pretty tits, lovely features, huge ass, probably the most perfect pussy, too. Lusting over him is fair, Jason thinks. Dick used to help him with his homework when Bruce was too busy to give him attention. While it helped Jason's studies, he struggles to keep his cock from tearing through his zipper when Dick is a tad bit close, or when he'd sling an arm over Jason's shoulder. entry.title: Birds of Prey
entry.summary:
Author: Castle53

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,893Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Jason Todd was expecting an interesting year. He wasn't expecting his entire past to be thrown into his lap, but what can you do? Dick's been missing for two years. Even he doesn't know where he was. But he killed them all. Tim never thought of Bruce as a good father, but he never thought the man would stoop this far. Roy wants to get out of heroism, thank you very much. Arthur Fleck started the year with one adopted son, and now he's got four. Fantastic.

entry.title: guess i need you (in a way that really scares me)
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,717Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Tim recognized—in what could only be considered a moment of lucidity outside the haze of horniness that washed over him in the moment—how fucked it was to make himself a piece of a moment not meant for him. He walked the walk of shame all the way to the shower, blasting himself with ice cold water. He couldn't even believe he'd done that; couldn't believe that he'd made himself a passive audience member in the sexual exploits of people he cared about without their permission. Perving on Dick, Jason, and Roy through a crack in the study door was a new low. He'd be thoroughly mortified if he was found out by either one of them.or: Jason, Dick, and Roy are non-monogamous soulmates and aren't discreet about it. Tim doesn't seem to mind all that much, to be honest.

entry.title: seven days at wayne mansions
entry.summary:
Author: almostnowandthen

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,278Chapters: 4/7Kudos: 70

Summary: Dick, Jason and Tim spend a week in Wayne Mansions in Monte Carlo with Bruce. Except, they're not here on vacation; they're here to Agatha Christie the shit out of their dad, who has, unfortunately, been cloned into multiple near-indistinguishable copies by an interdimensional doppelganger, and it's up to them to find the real Bruce Wayne before time runs out. It's a good thing that they're all professional vigilantes, who would never let their reckless sexual affairs, ongoing commitment issues, or poor parental relationships get in the way of getting the job done.

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,918Chapters: 7/16Kudos: 364

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”
